book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The Condemnation Sent by the Holy and Ecumenical Synod to Dioscorus.
title: The Condemnation Sent by the Holy and Ecumenical Synod to Dioscorus.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: The holy and great and ecumenical Synod, which by the grace of God according to the constitution of our most pious and beloved of God emperors assembled together at Chalcedon the city of Bithynia, in the martyry of the most holy and victorious Martyr Euphemia to Dioscorus.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: We do you to wit that on the thirteenth day of the month of October you were deposed from the episcopate and made a stranger to all ecclesiastical order (θεσμοῦ ) by the holy and ecumenical synod, on account of your disregard of the divine canons, and of your disobedience to this holy and ecumenical synod and on account of the other crimes of which you have been found guilty, for even when called to answer your accusers three times by this holy and great synod according to the divine canons you did not come.
